ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "position" TEXT /* Playing position */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth */,
  "player_height" INTEGER /* Height of the player (in cm) */,
  "player_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player (in kg) */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot (left or right) */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the current contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the current contract */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each club */,
  "club_name" TEXT /* Full name of the club */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the club is based */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the club competes */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the club was founded */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the current manager */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the club */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2005-06) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the champion team for the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player participating in the game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season in which the game was played */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club the player was part of during the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opposing club */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player in the game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., 2-1) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators in the stadium */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player in the season */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player in the season */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the player in the season */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total yellow cards received by the player in the season */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Total red cards received by the player in the season */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the player in the season */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Total clean sheets (for goalkeepers and defenders) */,
  "penalties_scored" INTEGER /* Total penalties scored by the player */,
  "penalties_missed" INTEGER /* Total penalties missed by the player */,
  "injuries" INTEGER /* Total number of injuries during the season */,
  "suspensions" INTEGER /* Total number of suspensions during the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being transferred */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club the player is being transferred to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season in which the transfer occurred */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of the transfer */,
  "transfer_fee" TEXT /* Transfer fee (in USD) */,
  "previous_club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the previous club */,
  "transfer_type" TEXT /* Type of transfer (e.g., permanent, loan) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_previous_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("previous_club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose data is being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
